template_data.headline_html: Five compliance traps every GSA holder must already know.

items.title: Quarterly sales reporting
items.sub: Every GSA dollar logged on time, every quarter

items.title: Current price list
items.sub: Commercial rate changes must flow to your GSA list

items.title: TAA product sourcing
items.sub: Country of origin matters — verify before an audit does

items.title: Contractor Assessment Visits
items.sub: GSA reviews records without warning — be ready always

items.title: 5-year option renewals
items.sub: Miss the window and you restart from zero

template_data.image_headline: HOLD THE SCHEDULE. PASS THE AUDIT.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic alert layout. Bold warning headline top: 'HOLD THE SCHEDULE. PASS THE AUDIT.' with caution icon. Left column: illustrated professional in navy blazer reviewing contract documents on clipboard, expression focused. Right column: 5 checklist rows each with a green checkmark and a short 2-3 word label: 'SALES REPORT', 'PRICE LIST', 'TAA SOURCING', 'CAV AUDIT', 'OPTION RENEWAL'. Dark navy banner at bottom with short callout phrase. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
